jd_summary: Leadership Development Partner/Officer at a bank, designing and delivering leadership programs (virtual, in-person, e-learning) grounded in adult-learning principles, partnering with stakeholders to identify development needs and build current/future leaders.
yoe_required: 5+ years (facilitation/presentation); experience designing & delivering leadership development programs

key_points.one_liner: HR Leadership Development Officer (~5+ yrs facilitation/L&D), $85-120K, Portland - L&D design + delivery focus.
key_points.years_experience_asked: 5+ years (facilitation/presentation); experience designing & delivering leadership development programs
must_have_skills: Bachelor's degree in HR, Organizational Development, Business, or related field (or equivalent experience); Master's preferred
5+ years of strong facilitation and presentation skills with the ability to engage diverse audiences
Experience designing and delivering leadership development programs
Knowledge of leadership frameworks and adult learning principles
